subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou art He Who hath manifested Thy Most Great Name and Thy Most Luminous Light, and through it hath guided the peoples and shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و انت الذی یا الهی اظهرت اسمک الاعظم و نورک الانور و هدیت به الامم و اشرقت
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the departed, @soul; spirit after death
